description: E2E test case designs for opencode-git crate - Git operations wrapper

test_cases.title: Git operations on repository
steps: Create temp directory with git repo
Create file, git add, git commit
Call status() and diff() and verify output
test_cases.notes: GitManager only has status() and diff() methods - no log() method exists

test_cases.title: GitHub client API integration
test_cases.description: Test GitHub client REST API calls
expected_outcomes: GitHubIssue and GitHubPullRequest have expected fields
test_cases.notes: API integration tests require mock server - tested structures instead

test_cases.title: Branch operations
test_cases.notes: GitManager doesn't have branches(), current_branch(), or checkout() methods. Branch operations are standalone functions in branch module.

test_cases.title: Git credentials not exposed in logs
test_cases.description: CRITICAL: Git credentials must never appear in logs
steps: Configure remote with HTTPS URL containing token
expected_outcomes: Token/password not visible in any output
test_cases.notes: Requires code change to implement credential redaction in logging

test_cases.title: SSH key passphrase handling
test_cases.description: SSH keys with passphrase must prompt or fail gracefully
test_cases.risk_addressed: Passphrase stored in memory and logged
test_cases.preconditions: Git repo with SSH remote requiring passphrase
expected_outcomes: Passphrase not stored in memory longer than needed
test_cases.notes: Requires code change to implement secure passphrase handling

test_cases.title: Checkout to new branch creates it
test_cases.description: Checkout -b must create and switch to new branch
test_cases.notes: Requires code change - no checkout() function exists in branch module

test_cases.title: Checkout failure on uncommitted changes
test_cases.description: Must handle or refuse checkout with dirty working tree
test_cases.notes: Requires code change - no checkout() function exists

test_cases.title: Rebase conflict handling
test_cases.description: Rebase conflicts must be reported and handled gracefully
test_cases.risk_addressed: Unresolved rebase conflict left in repo
test_cases.notes: Requires code change - rebase module exists but not fully tested

test_cases.title: Remote operation timeout
test_cases.description: Network failures during remote operations handled
test_cases.notes: Tests verify error handling for nonexistent remote. Timeout not explicitly tested but errors handled.

test_cases.title: Push to remote with divergent history
test_cases.description: Push rejected when remote has diverged - must handle
test_cases.risk_addressed: Force push overwrites remote changes accidentally
test_cases.notes: Requires code change and actual remote setup

test_cases.title: Detached HEAD state handling
test_cases.description: Manager must handle or prevent detached HEAD
test_cases.risk_addressed: Work lost in detached HEAD state
steps: Verify current_branch() returns null or special value
expected_outcomes: Changes preserved when leaving detached state
test_cases.notes: Requires code change - no current_branch() method exists on GitManager

test_cases.title: GitHub API rate limit handling
test_cases.description: GitHub API rate limit errors handled correctly
test_cases.risk_addressed: Rate limit causing failures without retry
test_cases.preconditions: GitHub token with known rate limit
steps: Verify 403 with rate limit info returned
expected_outcomes: Rate limit error returned with reset time
test_cases.notes: Requires mock server and code change for proper rate limit handling

test_cases.title: GitHub token permissions validation
test_cases.description: Insufficient token permissions return clear error
test_cases.risk_addressed: Silent failure when token lacks permissions
steps: Use token without 'repo' scope for private repo
test_cases.notes: Requires mock server and code change for proper permission validation

critical_invariants: Uncommitted changes not lost on checkout
